title: parodia microsperma var. lohaniana
intro: Parodia microsperma var. lohaniana, also known as Lohanjah or Parodia lohaniana, is a rare and beautiful cactus species in the Parodia genus, characterized by its unique, globular stems and white or yellowish spines. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Parodia microsperma var. lohaniana include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, typically in combination with other medicinal plants, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
